name: Pizza with Garlicky Pomodorini

ingredients.item: large pizza shell (see my wood oven pizza recipe.)
pomodorini tomatoes -cut in half, leave the whole ones
olive oil plus olive oil for drizzling

method: In a bowl, mix 2 T olive oil, 1 minced garlic, 1/4 cup chopped parsley, and 1 cup of pomodorini. Set aside. After parbaking a pizza bottom, remove from oven, and preheat to broil, 500°F. Drizzle olive oil, grated pecorino, and pomodorini. Arrange mozzarella strips and broil until the top is golden brown and the cheeses are bubbly. Remove from oven and slice with a pizza cutter. This is one of our favorites! Serves 2. Olé
